description: The agent strictly enforces Contoso Ltd.'s travel policies without any violations or misinterpretations.
The agent accurately calculates budget constraints, ensuring no errors in totals or ignored constraints.
The agent suggests viable travel alternatives that meet policy requirements and reduce costs by at least 10%.
The agent communicates decisions clearly, including the rationale for approval, rejection, or alternative suggestions.
The agent processes travel requests efficiently, minimizing unnecessary delays while maintaining thoroughness.
Other important quality factors not covered by listed criteria.
